subject: [PATCH v5 9/9] mm: switch deferred split shrinker to list_lru

2026-05-27.patch_summary: This patch updates the deferred split shrinker to use list_lru, which properly sets up per-node and per-cgroup lists. This change improves handling of cgroups in a suboptimal fashion by avoiding imperfect guard rails and streamlining list operations and reclaim walks. The update also adds calls to create node heads for cgroups on demand when the first object of interest is allocated, eliminating the need for special care in migration code between nodes.
